sb_prompt: WHAT DO YOU CONSIDER THE MOST IMPORTANT BENEFITS BESIDES SALARY IN A JOB WITH A LARGE ORGANIZATION?  HOW SATISFIED ARE YOU WITH THE CURRENT BENEFITS OF YOUR JOB
turns:
Participants are discussing job benefits besides salary in large organizations. They also mention their satisfaction level with their current jobs' benefits.

Part

Well, I think that besides salaries, having good health insurance coverage, retirement plans, paid time off, and other perks can really make a difference when choosing a job. These benefits show that an organization cares for its employees beyond just their paychecks. As for my current job, I am satisfied with most of the benefits they offer. However, there is room for improvement when it comes to work-life balance and flexibility.
